reasoning: Emotional axis (60%): Strong Zelda palette — saturated Link-green body with gold/yellow outer ring reads warm, bright, and friendly. Circular silhouette is round and toy-like, not threatening. Color choices (green + gold) are thematically on-point for a Hyrule UI confirm icon. Score ~8/10 emotional. Technical axis (40%): Pixel-grid-snapped with visible 1px hard outlines at zoom; 2–3 tone hard shading is present (dark green shadow, mid green body, lighter highlight). No anti-aliasing detected. However, the outer ring dithering/scatter produces a slightly noisy read at native 1x size, and the internal motif (sword/check shape) is ambiguous at small scale — detail density is at the edge of legibility. Denzi reference items show crisper internal silhouettes and stronger outline-to-fill contrast. Score ~6/10 technical. Weighted: 0.6*8 + 0.4*6 = 7.2 → 7. Marginal: passes emotional criteria, minor technical refinement needed on outline clarity and interior readability.
